summary: Expands analyze with stable summary, trend, compare, and regime outputs; adds rolling window summaries, confidence metadata, citation propagation, and consistent table formatting.
highlights: Analyze summary now emits stable machine-readable metadata and cleaner table output
Analyze trend supports confidence metadata and improved presentation
Analyze compare and regime extend the analysis surface with comparison and experimental regime detection
Rolling summary windows are now supported with --window
Citation and source provenance now flow through analyze outputs and footer rendering
Table formatting is consistent across obs, transform, and analyze commands
Live FRED traffic is paced more conservatively and tests are rate-aware
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
